query:

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice most effectively combines the sentences at the underlined portion?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"despite the fact that the product is often lauded for its high-quality design and cutting-edge features, the company’s true strength lies in its flexibility.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"despite the fact that the product is often lauded for its high-quality design and cutting-edge features; the company’s true strength lies in its flexibility.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"despite the fact that the product is often lauded for its high-quality design and cutting-edge features, but the company’s true strength lies in its flexibility.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"despite the fact that the product is often lauded for its high-quality design and cutting-edge features, the company''s true strength lies in its flexibility, and","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The best way to combine these two sentences is to use a comma and the coordinating conjunction "but." This choice creates a smooth transition between the two ideas and avoids creating a comma splice or a run-on sentence.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The most important factor in the success of this company, many believe, is the product’s ability to quickly adapt to the ever-changing demands of the marketplace.  Despite the fact that the product is often lauded for its high-quality design and cutting-edge features, the company’s true strength lies in its flexibility, and the company’s unwavering commitment to meeting those demands.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which of the following revisions to the text is most consistent with the conventions of Standard English?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"No, they won’t; they’ll think you’ve got to do it for nothing, because they can do it themselves. . . . That’s so; that’s just the way it is, all right. . . . Why, Joe, don’t you think you’d like to have a nice, bright, new, white, clean fence like this? . . . No, sir. . . . I know what! I’ll give you the whole fence and let you whitewash it. All right, I’ll take it. . . . You take the whole fence for a cent, Joe? Why, I think you’re the luckiest boy I ever saw. . . . Well, I guess I’ll take it. Thanks. . . . ","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"No, they won’t; they’ll think you’ve got to do it for nothing, because they can do it themselves. . . . That’s so; that’s just the way it is, all right. . . . Why, Joe, don’t you think you’d like to have a nice, bright, new, white, clean fence like this? . . . No, sir. . . . I know what! I’ll give you the whole fence, and let you whitewash it. All right, I’ll take it. . . . You take the whole fence for a cent, Joe? Why, I think you’re the luckiest boy I ever saw. . . . Well, I guess I’ll take it. Thanks. . . . ","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"No, they won’t; they’ll think you’ve got to do it for nothing, because they can do it themselves. . . . That’s so, that’s just the way it is, all right. . . . Why, Joe, don’t you think you’d like to have a nice, bright, new, white, clean fence like this? . . . No, sir. . . . I know what! I’ll give you the whole fence, and let you whitewash it. All right, I’ll take it. . . . You take the whole fence for a cent, Joe? Why, I think you’re the luckiest boy I ever saw. . . . Well, I guess I’ll take it. Thanks. . . . ","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"No, they won’t; they’ll think you’ve got to do it for nothing, because they can do it themselves. . . . That’s so; that’s just the way it is, all right. . . . Why, Joe, don’t you think you’d like to have a nice, bright, new, white, clean fence like this? . . . No, sir. . . . I know what. I’ll give you the whole fence, and let you whitewash it. All right, I’ll take it. . . . You take the whole fence for a cent, Joe? Why, I think you’re the luckiest boy I ever saw. . . . Well, I guess I’ll take it. Thanks. . . . ","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The correct answer is B. The only error in the passage is the use of a comma instead of a semicolon in the sentence: \"I’ll give you the whole fence, and let you whitewash it."  Semicolons are used to join two complete sentences.  Using a comma here creates a comma splice, which is an error in Standard English.  All the other choices in the passage are grammatically correct.  The semicolon in choice B is the correct way to join two complete sentences.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The following text is adapted from "The Adventures of Tom Sawyer" by Mark Twain.  Tom is trying to convince his friend Joe to help him whitewash a fence.  \"I reckon they''ll  be  glad to give  you  a  cent, won''t they?  ". . . \"No, they won''t; they''ll  think  you''ve  got to do it for nothing, because they can  do  it themselves. . . . \"That''s so;  that''s  just  the way  it  is,  all  right. . . . \"Why,  Joe,  don''t  you  think  you''d  like  to  have  a  nice,  bright,  new,  white,  clean  fence  like  this?  ". . . \"No, sir. . . . \"I know what!  I''ll  give  you  the  whole  fence  and  let you  whitewash  it.  All  right,  I''ll  take  it. . . . \"You  take  the  whole  fence  for  a  cent,  Joe?  Why, I  think  you''re  the  luckiest  boy  I  ever  saw. . . . \"Well, I  guess  I''ll  take  it.  Thanks.  . . . "',
    'passage',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice correctly uses a comma to set off a nonrestrictive clause in the sentence?  "The artist whose work is characterized by its vibrant colors and bold brushstrokes, is known for her landscapes." ',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The artist, whose work is characterized by its vibrant colors and bold brushstrokes, is known for her landscapes.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The artist whose work is characterized by its vibrant colors, and bold brushstrokes, is known for her landscapes.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The artist whose work is characterized by its vibrant colors and bold brushstrokes is known for her landscapes,","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The artist whose work is characterized by its vibrant colors and bold brushstrokes is known, for her landscapes.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The phrase "whose work is characterized by its vibrant colors and bold brushstrokes" is a nonrestrictive clause.  A nonrestrictive clause adds additional information, but it isn''t essential to the meaning of the sentence.  Nonrestrictive clauses are set off with commas.  The comma after "artist" and before "is known" is correctly placed.  ',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    NULL,
    NULL,

    gen_random_uuid(),
    'What is the most likely reason the author uses short, declarative sentences in this passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"To create a sense of suspense and anticipation.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"To emphasize the speaker''s emotional state.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"To provide a vivid description of the scene.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"To highlight the speaker''s sense of confusion.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The use of short, declarative sentences emphasizes the speaker''s emotional state.  The short sentences create a sense of urgency and immediacy, which can reflect the speaker''s increasing anxiety.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses a series of short, declarative sentences to describe the scene. This creates a sense of urgency and immediacy. It also emphasizes the speaker''s growing anxiety. What is the most likely reason the writer uses this style?',

    'In this passage, the writer uses figurative language to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"describe the speaker’s feelings and experiences.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the importance of the speaker’s message.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the speaker is addressing a large audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'Figurative language is used to help the reader understand the speaker''s feelings and experiences in a more vivid and concrete way. For example, metaphors and similes can be used to compare the speaker''s feelings to something else, which can help the reader better understand the speaker''s perspective.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses a number of stylistic devices to help the reader understand the speaker’s unique perspective. For example, the speaker uses a number of vivid and evocative images to help the reader understand the speaker’s feelings about the situation. The author also uses figurative language, such as metaphors and similes, to help the reader understand the speaker’s feelings in a more concrete way. What is the most likely reason why the writer uses figurative language?',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best corrects the capitalization error in the passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"It is said that all good things must come to an end. But in the case of the *Great Plains*, this is a bad thing. While most people see *the Great Plains* as a monotonous landscape, it is truly a vital ecosystem.  The *Great Plains* is a diverse area, rich in plant and animal life and is a crucial part of the migratory routes of many birds.  The *Great Plains* are crucial for the survival of the greater sage grouse, the black-footed ferret, and the swift fox.  These animals are all in danger, and the *Great Plains* are also at risk from human activity, such as oil drilling and agriculture. This has led to the loss of many species, with the *Great Plains* in danger of becoming a barren desert.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"It is said that all good things must come to an end. But in the case of the *Great Plains*, this is a bad thing. While most people see *the Great Plains* as a monotonous landscape, it is truly a vital ecosystem.  The Great Plains is a diverse area, rich in plant and animal life and is a crucial part of the migratory routes of many birds.  The Great Plains are crucial for the survival of the greater sage grouse, the black-footed ferret, and the swift fox.  These animals are all in danger, and the Great Plains are also at risk from human activity, such as oil drilling and agriculture. This has led to the loss of many species, with the Great Plains in danger of becoming a barren desert.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"It is said that all good things must come to an end. But in the case of the Great Plains, this is a bad thing. While most people see the Great Plains as a monotonous landscape, it is truly a vital ecosystem.  The Great Plains is a diverse area, rich in plant and animal life and is a crucial part of the migratory routes of many birds.  The Great Plains are crucial for the survival of the greater sage grouse, the black-footed ferret, and the swift fox.  These animals are all in danger, and the Great Plains are also at risk from human activity, such as oil drilling and agriculture. This has led to the loss of many species, with the Great Plains in danger of becoming a barren desert.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"It is said that all good things must come to an end. But in the case of the Great Plains, this is a bad thing. While most people see the Great Plains as a monotonous landscape, it is truly a vital ecosystem.  The Great Plains is a diverse area, rich in plant and animal life and is a crucial part of the migratory routes of many birds.  The Great Plains are crucial for the survival of the greater sage grouse, the black-footed ferret, and the swift fox.  These animals are all in danger, and the Great Plains are also at risk from human activity, such as oil drilling and agriculture. This has led to the loss of many species, with the Great Plains in danger of becoming a barren desert.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The phrase "Great Plains" should be capitalized as it refers to a specific geographical area.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'It is said that all good things must come to an end. But in the case of the *Great Plains*, this is a bad thing. While most people see *the Great Plains* as a monotonous landscape, it is truly a vital ecosystem.  The *Great Plains* is a diverse area, rich in plant and animal life and is a crucial part of the migratory routes of many birds.  The *Great Plains* are crucial for the survival of the greater sage grouse, the black-footed ferret, and the swift fox.  These animals are all in danger, and the *Great Plains* are also at risk from human activity, such as oil drilling and agriculture. This has led to the loss of many species, with the *Great Plains* in danger of becoming a barren desert.',
    'passage',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The passage is primarily about',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"the narrator''s relationship with their grandmother.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"the narrator''s grandmother''s character and personality.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"the narrator''s fond memories of their grandmother.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"the narrator''s grandmother''s impact on their life.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The narrator’s account of their grandmother’s life suggests that their grandmother was a source of strength and inspiration for them, and that her memory is a source of comfort and joy.  Therefore, the passage is primarily about the narrator’s grandmother’s impact on their life.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The narrator''s account of their grandmother''s life is full of fond memories and anecdotes. The narrator describes how their grandmother, a strong, independent woman, persevered through difficult times, and how she always had a smile on her face. The narrator also emphasizes how their grandmother was always willing to help others, whether it was by lending a helping hand or simply offering a kind word. The narrator''s account suggests that their grandmother was a source of strength and inspiration for them, and that her memory is a source of comfort and joy. What is the main idea of the passage?',
    'passage',

    'Information and Ideas',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'When it comes to our diets, we often focus on the big things: the amount of fat and sugar we eat. But the small things —the condiments we use—can have a big impact on our overall health. Take ketchup, for example. Many people believe that ketchup is a healthy choice because it is made with tomatoes, which are high in lycopene. However, the high sugar content of most commercially produced ketchups means they can contribute to weight gain and other health problems. So, while a tomato-based ketchup may seem like a healthy choice, it''s important to read the nutrition labels carefully to make sure that you are not consuming too much sugar.',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"—and it’s important to read the nutrition labels carefully to make sure that you are not consuming too much sugar.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"—it is important to read the nutrition labels carefully to make sure that you are not consuming too much sugar.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"—; it’s important to read the nutrition labels carefully to make sure that you are not consuming too much sugar.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"—it’s important to read the nutrition labels carefully to make sure that you are not consuming too much sugar—","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'Choice B is the best answer. The dash and the comma work together to separate the nonessential phrase from the rest of the sentence. The rest of the choices are incorrect because they use incorrect punctuation. Choice A is incorrect because it uses a comma splice. Choice C is incorrect because it uses a semicolon to separate the nonessential phrase, which is incorrect. Choice D is incorrect because it uses two dashes, which is incorrect.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'When it comes to our diets, we often focus on the big things: the amount of fat and sugar we eat. But the small things —the condiments we use—can have a big impact on our overall health. Take ketchup, for example. Many people believe that ketchup is a healthy choice because it is made with tomatoes, which are high in lycopene. However, the high sugar content of most commercially produced ketchups means they can contribute to weight gain and other health problems. So, while a tomato-based ketchup may seem like a healthy choice, it''s important to read the nutrition labels carefully to make sure that you are not consuming too much sugar.  "Which of the following choices most effectively completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?"',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'According to the passage, what is a negative consequence of the media’s shift to a more entertainment-focused model?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The media has become less accessible to the general public.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The media is less likely to provide accurate information.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The media is less likely to present a balanced perspective on important issues.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The media is less likely to engage in critical analysis of current events.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The passage states that the media''s shift to a more entertainment-focused model has made it more difficult for people to have informed and productive conversations about important issues. This suggests that the media is less likely to present a balanced perspective on important issues, which is a negative consequence of this shift.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The central argument of the passage is that the role of the media in modern society has changed. The passage discusses the traditional role of the media as a source of information and analysis, and then it contrasts this with the role of the media today, which is more focused on entertainment and opinion. The passage suggests that this change has had a negative impact on the public discourse, making it more difficult for people to have informed and productive conversations about important issues. According to the passage, which of the following is a negative consequence of the media’s shift to a more entertainment-focused model?',

    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which of the following best describes the author’s main point about the red-tailed hawk?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The red-tailed hawk is a species that is well-adapted to its environment.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"Red-tailed hawks are facing challenges to their survival due to changes in their environment.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The red-tailed hawk population is expected to decline in the future due to changes in their environment.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The red-tailed hawk is a species that is rapidly adapting to changes in its environment.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The author explains the challenges facing red-tailed hawks in adapting to their changing environment and suggests that these changes will likely have a negative impact on their survival. This supports the idea that the red-tailed hawk population is expected to decline in the future.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The passage describes the challenges of a particular species, the red-tailed hawk, in adapting to a changing environment. Red-tailed hawks are known to be adaptable, but the changing environment has introduced new challenges. The author explains how these challenges are affecting the hawks’ survival, and the author suggests that the red-tailed hawk population will likely be impacted by these changes.',

    'In this passage, symbolism is primarily used to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create vivid pictures in the reader’s mind.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"add deeper meaning to the text.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"reveal the characters’ thoughts and feelings.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"convey the author’s personal feelings and experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'Symbolism is used to add deeper meaning to the text by representing abstract ideas with concrete objects or images.  For example, the author might use a bird to symbolize freedom or a flower to symbolize beauty.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses a variety of literary devices to convey the main idea of the text, which is that the protagonist, a young girl named Molly, is not as innocent as she appears to be.  The author uses imagery to create vivid pictures in the reader’s mind, helping the reader to understand Molly’s experiences.  The author uses symbolism to add deeper meaning to the text.  The author uses dialogue to reveal the characters’ thoughts and feelings. What is the primary way that the writer uses symbolism in the text?',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this passage, the word "you" is used to',

    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"describe the speaker’s feelings and experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the importance of the speaker’s message.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the speaker is addressing a large audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The speaker is addressing the reader directly by using the word "you." This creates a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader, which can help the reader feel more engaged with the message.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The most obvious sign that the speaker is speaking directly to the reader is the use of the word "you."     'What is the primary focus of this passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The shift from preindustrial economies to industrial economies.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The rise of capitalism in the United States.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The principles of capitalism.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The effects of factory production on the United States.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The passage is primarily focused on the rise of capitalism in the United States.  The passage describes the principles of capitalism and how those principles were absent in preindustrial economies, but the primary focus is on the emergence of capitalism in the United States and the effects of that emergence on the nation’s economy and social structure.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The following text is excerpted from a book about the effects of the Industrial Revolution on the United States.  
 The Industrial Revolution led to the widespread adoption of factory production, which, in turn, encouraged the development of a new economic system known as capitalism. Capitalism is based on the principles of free enterprise, private ownership, and competition. These principles were largely absent from the preindustrial economies of Europe, where most production took place in the home or in small workshops. Because of this, capitalism''s emergence in the United States led to a fundamental shift in the nation''s economy and its social structure.',
    'passage',

    '[{"id":"A","text":"The writer intends to emphasize the importance of the astronauts’ achievement by suggesting that they were recognized for their bravery and skill.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The writer intends to convey the astronauts’ feelings of pride and accomplishment by suggesting that they felt honored by their reception.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The writer intends to create a sense of suspense by suggesting that the astronauts’ homecoming was unexpected.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The writer intends to highlight the astronauts’ humility by suggesting that they were surprised by the attention they received.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',

    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',

    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The city of Rome is known for its many historic landmarks, and for its beautiful architecture.     'What is the most likely reason why the author uses a variety of literary devices in this passage?',

    'B',
    'The author uses a variety of literary devices to help the reader understand the speaker’s feelings and experiences. For example, the author uses imagery to create vivid pictures in the reader’s mind. The author also uses figurative language to help the reader understand the speaker’s thoughts and feelings.     'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The poem begins with a striking image of a young man standing on a mountaintop, looking out over a vast and sprawling landscape. This image suggests that the speaker is both physically and emotionally isolated. Throughout the poem, the speaker reflects on the ways that isolation has shaped his thoughts and feelings. This reflection is evident in the speaker’s descriptions of his own inner world, as well as his observations of the natural world around him. However, the poem ultimately concludes with a sense of hope and possibility. This suggests that the speaker has found a way to transcend his isolation and find meaning in his life, even in the face of adversity.  The main idea of the poem is that isolation can be a powerful force for reflection and growth.  The author uses a variety of literary devices to create a powerful and moving exploration of this theme. What is the most likely reason why the author uses a variety of literary devices?',
